top_signals.title: Heavy rain continues across country with two approaching tropical storms
top_signals.summary: Central Japan Railway said the Tokaido Shinkansen may be delayed or suspended Saturday, while East Japan Railway warned of possible regular train line delays over the weekend.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European Natural Gas Edges Higher as Traders Monitor Hormuz Risk
top_signals.summary: European natural gas prices inched higher after an attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz renewed fears about safe passage through the critical waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra at the ENVI Council
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Luxembourg, 25 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Very good evening, I have been thanking you more often for your tenacity. Thank you very much for being here.
This morning at the doorstep...
